use_cases: Triggering actions and events in web applications
Toggle states and mode switching in UI controls
Accessible interactive elements with focus management
ai_summary: A reusable button component with multiple style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition support and class-variance-authority for consistent styling. Features standard focus-visible states, disabled states, and shadow effects. A foundational atomic component suitable for any UI framework or industry.
